title: rhomboda arunachalensis
intro: Rhomboda arunachalensis is a rare and endangered flowering plant species found in the Eastern Himalayas, specifically in the states of Arunachal Pradesh and Assam in India. It is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation. Rhomboda arunachalensis is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
